## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `ai` — AI model / pipeline change
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no feature / bug change)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `chore` — Config, dependencies
- [ ] `breaking change` — Existing functionality is affected

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (`black` + `ruff` for Python, `prettier` + `eslint` for JS)
- [ ] No `.env`, API keys, or secrets committed
- [ ] No leftover `console.log` / `print` debug statements
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format (e.g. `feat(auth): add refresh token`)
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `develop`
